name: curl-load-runner
description: HTTP API runner for curl-load — manages k6 load test processes

scripts.minify: html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --minify-css true --minify-js true -o public/index.html public/index.html && html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --minify-css true --minify-js true -o public/load-tester.html public/load-tester.html
